---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for one of the packages
title: "[feat]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Affected package**
e.g. `@nx-safe-suite/route-guard`, or "new package" if proposing something new.

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem you're facing.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What should happen instead.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here.
